description.unified: Deals 204*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 100% Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by [25%->24%] and ATK Spd by [20%->18%] for 4sec.

For 17sec, increases P.DEF of the [all allies->4allies] with the lowest P.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), increases their P.Block Chance by [150->140], and reduces P.DMG taken by [10%->11%].

On Block, deals 48*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+36.7% ATK Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by [3.5%->4%] for 6sec, and increases your Physical DEF by [9%->6%]. These effects stack up to 4 times.

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by [100->110].

description.unified: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by [210->{0}] for 4 sec.
[Guardian Shield] Removes negative effects from self and increases DEF boost by {0}%.

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by [10%->4%]. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Every 3 Skill uses, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by {0}% and ATK by {1}% for 15 sec.
